title: Assistant Store Manager - IKEA India Digital Technologies - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - IKEA India Digital Technologies - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IKEA India Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IKEA India Digital Technologies:
IKEA India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India Digital Technologies!
